user.title: Configure Swedavia
user.description:
Enter your Swedavia API keys. See the README for instructions on how to register at the Swedavia API Developer Portal.

Rate limit note: 10 airports × 60 min interval ≈ 14,400 req/month (free tier: 10,000/month). Use fewer airports or longer intervals to stay within limits.

data_description.flightinfo_api_key: Subscription key for FlightInfo v2 API
data_description.waittime_api_key: Subscription key for WaitTime Public v2 API
data_description.airports: Select one or more Swedavia airports
data_description.flightinfo_interval: Recommended: ≥ 60 min to stay within the free tier
data_description.waittime_interval: Recommended: ≥ 30 min to stay within the free tier
